name: agent-pipeline-codex
description: Multi-stage agentic pipeline runner for Codex Desktop App projects. Orchestrates manifest -> research -> plan -> test-write -> execute -> policy -> verify -> drift-detect -> critique -> auto-promote -> manager. v0.2 adds the module-release pipeline. v0.3 adds the dual-AI audit-handoff discipline. v0.4 adds the judge layer. v0.5 adds single-AI hardening: critic + drift-detector stages, pre-edit fact-forcing in the executor, expanded judge classification, machine-checkable auto-promote, and strict manifest schema validation.

interface.shortDescription: Manifest-driven multi-stage agent workflow for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Agent Pipeline for Codex brings the agentic-pipeline discipline to Codex Desktop App: explicit manifests, human gates, role-scoped subagents, policy checks, drift detection, critique, auto-promote, module-release rehearsal, and dual-AI audit handoff scaffolding.
